title: gossypium hirsutum subsp. prostratum
intro: Gossypium hirsutum subsp. prostratum, also known as prostrate cotton, is a subspecies of the cotton plant, native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which can be used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of prostrate cotton include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Gossypium hirsutum subsp. prostratum include infusions and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall health and well-being.
